features.name: First Fight Style
features.description: Choose a fighting style from the list of available options.

features.name: Second Fighting Style
features.description: Choose a second fighting style, different from your first choice.

features.name: Combat Superiority
features.description: You gain additional combat advantages. You can use your reaction to impose disadvantage on one attack roll made against you.

features.name: Bane
features.description: When you hit a target with an opportunity attack, the creature has disadvantage on attack rolls against you until the end of your next turn.

features.name: Severe Wounds
features.description: You gain additional Hit Points equal to your fighter level when you take severe wounds, and you can use a bonus action to regain additional Hit Points.
